name: gemini-discord
description: Always-on Discord gateway for Gemini CLI. Bidirectional chat, conversation memory, streaming responses.

settings.name: Primary Discord Channel ID
settings.description: The main channel ID the bot will listen to and reply in.

settings.name: Owner Discord User IDs
settings.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs who have full ownership over the bot.

settings.name: Admin Discord User ID
settings.description: A single User ID designated for privileged commands. Leave blank to default to the first Owner.

settings.name: Allowed Channel IDs
settings.description: Comma-separated list of all channel IDs the bot is allowed to read/write in.

settings.name: Allowed User IDs
settings.description: Additional user IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Leave blank for owners only.

settings.name: Memory Scope
settings.description: Whether context history is tracked globally ('global') or per channel ('channel').

settings.name: Gemini Session Binding Scope
settings.description: Scope for preserving underlying Gemini CLI sessions ('channel', 'global', or 'server').
